parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $json.body.patient_id, raw_input: $json.body.raw_input, nurse_name: $json.body.nurse_name || 'Nurse', shift: $json.body.shift || 'day', input_type: $json.body.input_type || 'note' }) }}

={{ (() => { const notes = $('N3b Fetch Prior Notes').all(); const now = new Date(); let prior_notes_context = 'No prior notes available.'; if (notes && notes.length > 0) { prior_notes_context = 'Prior clinical context (last ' + notes.length + ' notes, most recent first):

' + notes.map((n, i) => { let parsed; try { parsed = typeof n.json.structured_note === 'string' ? JSON.parse(n.json.structured_note) : n.json.structured_note; } catch (e) { return '[' + (i + 1) + '] Unable to parse note'; } const created = new Date(n.json.created_at); const hoursAgo = Math.round((now - created) / 3600000); const ageLabel = hoursAgo < 24 ? hoursAgo + ' hours ago' : Math.round(hoursAgo / 24) + ' days ago'; return '[' + (i + 1) + '] ' + ageLabel + ' (' + created.toLocaleTimeString('en-GB', {hour:'2-digit', minute:'2-digit'}) + '):
  Assessment: ' + (parsed.assessment || 'N/A') + '
  Plan: ' + (parsed.plan || 'N/A'); }).join('

'); } const patientData = $('N3 Fetch Patient Context').item.json[0] || $('N3 Fetch Patient Context').item.json; const input = $('N2 Parse Input').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ patient_id: input.patient_id, raw_input: input.raw_input, nurse_name: input.nurse_name, shift: input.shift, input_type: input.input_type, patient_context: patientData, prior_notes_context: prior_notes_context }); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a clinical documentation assistant helping nurses create accurate, structured patient notes.

Given a nurse's raw dictation and the patient's current context, produce:
1. A structured clinical note in SOAP format (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan)
2. A flagged field (true/false) — flag if any value is outside expected range or requires urgent human review
3. A flag_reason (string) — plain English explanation of why this was flagged, if applicable
4. A procedures array — list any clinical procedures mentioned that would require supplies

Patient context: ' + JSON.stringify($('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.patient_context) + '
Raw dictation: ' + $('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.raw_input + '
Shift: ' + $('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.shift + '

Prior clinical context (last 5 notes, most recent first):
' + $('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.prior_notes_context + '

Use the prior clinical context to inform your assessment and plan. Reference relevant history where it affects the current note (e.g., "consistent with prior assessments" or "new finding compared to previous check"). Do not repeat prior notes verbatim.

Return valid JSON only. No preamble. No explanation outside the JSON.

{
  "structured_note": { "subjective": "", "objective": "", "assessment": "", "plan": "" },
  "flagged": false,
  "flag_reason": "",
  "procedures": []
}' }] }) }}

parameters.jsonOutput: ={{ (() => { const text = $json.content[0].text; const parsed = JSON.parse(text); const input = $('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ patient_id: input.patient_id, raw_input: input.raw_input, nurse_name: input.nurse_name, shift: input.shift, input_type: input.input_type, structured_note: parsed.structured_note, flagged: parsed.flagged, flag_reason: parsed.flag_reason || '', procedures: parsed.procedures || [], patient_context: input.patient_context }); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $json.patient_id, raw_input: $json.raw_input, structured_note: $json.structured_note, shift: $json.shift, nurse_name: $json.nurse_name, flagged: $json.flagged, flag_reason: $json.flag_reason }) }}

={{ (() => { const patientId = $('N2 Parse Input').item.json.patient_id; return JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a clinical handoff assistant helping incoming nurses start their shift with full situational awareness.

Given the patient record and recent notes, produce a structured handoff briefing. Prioritize: what changed, what needs watching, what is stable. Cut anything that does not help the incoming nurse in the first 30 minutes.

Patient record: ' + JSON.stringify($('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json.patient_context) + '
Recent notes: ' + JSON.stringify($('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json.structured_note) + '
Raw input: ' + $('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json.raw_input + '
Incoming shift: ' + ($('N2 Parse Input').item.json.shift === 'day' ? 'night' : 'day') + '

Prior clinical context (last 5 notes):
' + $('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.prior_notes_context + '

Return valid JSON only.

{
  "summary": "",
  "priority_flags": [
    { "type": "warning|critical", "detail": "" }
  ],
  "stable_items": [],
  "recommended_first_actions": []
}' }] }); })() }}

={{ (() => { let text = $json.content[0].text.replace(/```json\n?/g, '').replace(/```\n?/g, '').trim(); const supply = JSON.parse(text); return JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json.patient_id, procedure: supply.procedure, items: supply.items, rationale: supply.rationale || null }); })() }}

={{ (() => { const report = JSON.parse($json.content[0].text); return JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json.patient_id, incoming_nurse: $('N2 Parse Input').item.json.nurse_name || 'Incoming Nurse', summary: report.summary, flags: report.priority_flags, shift_start: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 512, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a clinical summarization assistant. Given a patient's record and their recent notes, produce a concise patient context summary that an incoming nurse could read in 30 seconds.

Prioritize: current status, active concerns, treatment trajectory, what needs watching.
Write as if briefing a colleague verbally -- short, prioritized, clinical.

Patient record: ' + JSON.stringify($('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.patient_context) + '
Recent notes (last 5, A+P only): ' + $('N3c Parse Prior Notes').item.json.prior_notes_context + '
Latest note: ' + JSON.stringify($('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json.structured_note) + '

Return a plain text summary, 3-5 sentences. No JSON wrapping. No headers.' }] }) }}

={{ (() => { const summary = $json.content[0].text; const noteCount = ($('N3b Fetch Prior Notes').all() || []).length + 1; return JSON.stringify({ patient_id: $('N2 Parse Input').item.json.patient_id, summary: summary, note_count: noteCount, generated_at: new Date().toISOString() }); })() }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const parsed = $('N5 Parse Claude Response').item.json; const strip = (t) => t.replace(/```json\n?/g, '').replace(/```\n?/g, '').trim(); const result = { success: true, note: { structured_note: parsed.structured_note, flagged: parsed.flagged, flag_reason: parsed.flag_reason, procedures: parsed.procedures, patient_id: parsed.patient_id, nurse_name: parsed.nurse_name, shift: parsed.shift } }; try { if (parsed.input_type === 'handoff') { result.handoff_report = JSON.parse(strip($('N8b Claude Handoff Report').item.json.content[0].text)); } } catch(e) {} try { if (parsed.procedures && parsed.procedures.length > 0) { const supplyData = JSON.parse(strip($('N8a Claude Supply List').item.json.content[0].text)); result.supply_list = { procedure: supplyData.procedure, rationale: supplyData.rationale || null, items: supplyData.items }; } } catch(e) {} return JSON.stringify(result); })() }}
